payload.description: Investigate and fix two observed problems while demoing FeedbackAlignmentTimeline: (1) report runs that execute in remote worker path fail with class-not-found, and (2) local runs can show zero buckets / no data due bucket parameter handling or period completeness defaults. Ensure local demo path is reliable and produce a report with visible data for review.
payload.title: Fix FeedbackAlignmentTimeline report execution and bucket selection defaults
